programme.title: Race Across the World
programme.desc: The five teams bid farewell to Europe and head into Asia, racing toward the remote riverside town of Halfeti, where the last to arrive will be eliminated from the competition.

programme.title: The Apprentice: The Final
programme.desc: It's week 12, and the finalists must launch their businesses to a roomful of industry experts before Lord Sugar finally decides who will become his next business partner.

programme.title: BBC News and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news, with reports from BBC correspondents worldwide.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: The latest news, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: Question Time
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents an hour of debate from Cardiff. On the panel are Huw Irranca-Davies, Rhun ap Iorwerth, Dan Thomas, Darren Millar, Jane Dodds and Anthony Slaughter.

programme.title: Newscast
programme.desc: Lighthearted discussion of the day's news.

programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: Detailed weather forecast.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: BBC One joins the BBC's rolling news channel for a night of news.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: The latest news, sport, business and weather from the BBC's Breakfast team.

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Join Gethin Jones, Helen Skelton, Michelle Ackerley and the team for conversation, advice and tips to make your day that little bit easier.

programme.title: Farm 999
programme.desc: Police in Hertfordshire respond to an emergency that uncovers a shocking crime, Scottish fire crews battle a wildfire visible from space, and Paul Colgan joins farm safety training.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion is dodging spiders at a house in Coventry. Owain is in Wales, where a detached house has a dodgy extension. In Bristol, Martin is swooning over a 1930s semi with bags of character.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Experts David Harper and Irita Marriott chase two high-energy teams around a packed antiques fair in the Scottish Borders town of Kelso.

programme.title: BBC News at One including BBC London News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown discovers there's more drama offstage than on in the latest production by the Kembleford Players.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Steve Brown guides a couple on their house hunt in Bedfordshire who are looking for the peace and quiet the county has to offer.

programme.title: I Made It at Market
programme.desc: Dom revisits textile weaver Shiv and portrait artist Jill to find out how they built life-changing businesses after leaving his business boot camp and how much they make from them.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: Roman Kemp, with sidekick Sarah Greene, hosts the quiz show where knowledge equals speed.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong is joined by co-host Tom Allen for the quiz where contestants try to score as few points as possible by coming up with the answers no-one else could think of.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: The latest news, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Alex Jones and JB Gill bring you the stories that matter from across the country.

programme.title: Extraordinary Portraits with Bill Bailey
programme.desc: Jordan and Cian are champion fundraisers aiming to beat dementia.

programme.title: Beyond Paradise
programme.desc: When a seaweed farm is targeted in an act of sabotage, all the evidence points to the legendary mermaid of Shipton Abbott.

programme.title: Have I Got News for You
programme.desc: Gabby Logan hosts, with guest panellists comedians Miles Jupp and Michelle Wolf joining team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop.

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Linda Walsh, Conor's one true love, is getting married to another man, which can only lead to chaos at the wedding. Contains some strong language.

programme.title: BBC News and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news, with reports from BBC correspondents worldwide.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: The latest news, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: The Claudia Winkleman Show
programme.desc: Claudia is joined by actor and writer Dan Levy, actor Phil Dunster, star of stage and screen Cush Jumbo and comedian Josh Widdicombe.

programme.title: The Royal Hotel
programme.desc: Work in a macho outback community's pub proves problematic for two female backpackers. Contains very strong language and some scenes of a sexual nature.

programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: Detailed weather forecast.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: BBC One joins the BBC's rolling news channel for a night of news.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: The latest news, sport, business and weather from the BBC's Breakfast team.

programme.title: Saturday Kitchen Live
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt is joined by chefs Nathan Outlaw, Andi Oliver and Sophia Handschuh aka Sourdough Sophia, and by special guest Judi Love. Olly Smith picks the wines to go with the studio dishes.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion creates a great drum beat on an old kitchen sink in Stoke.

programme.title: Football Focus
programme.desc: Alex Scott is joined by Martin Keown and Dion Dublin to discuss the weekend's football, including a Premier League clash between Man City and Arsenal, and the Merseyside derby.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest weather forecast.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Join Danny Sebastian for today's show from Harrogate, North Yorkshire, with experts Izzie Balmer and John Cameron. Danny gets some upcycling tips before heading to the auction.

programme.title: Snooker: World Championship
programme.desc: Coverage of day 1 of the World Snooker Championship at the Crucible Theatre, Sheffield.

programme.title: Final Score
programme.desc: Jason Mohammad and guests bring you all the goals, latest news, analysis, reaction and interviews from the afternoon's biggest football matches.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: The latest news, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest weather forecast.

programme.title: Celebrity Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp presents a celebrity special of the high-stakes quiz, featuring dancer Amy Dowden, actor Nina Wadia, Gladiator Montell Douglas and actress and musician Toyah Willcox.

programme.title: Blankety Blank
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts as Rhod Gilbert, Jill Scott, Aisling Bea, Guz Khan, Nitro and the Rev Kate Bottley try to fill in the missing blanks and win prizes for some lucky contestants.

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: With a guest appearance by Lewis Capaldi.
